prompt: Create a hyperreal cinematic close-up portrait of an elderly mystical figure, mostly obscured by a large solid matte brown square censor block centered over the face and upper torso. The visible parts show long wild gray-white hair framing both sides, a dirt- and ash-smeared forehead at the top edge, and weathered grimy hands at the bottom holding an ornate engraved brass or gold spherical artifact with intent. Use an elderly mystical figure, an ornate engraved brass sphere, and warm firelight mixed with dim smoky shadows. Subtle metallic reflections catch on the artifact, dirty fingernails, skin texture, and stray hair. Orange sparks and faint smoke drift through a dark background, with shallow depth of field and blurred golden foreground bokeh. The mood is tense, ancient, ritualistic, and mysterious; the hidden eyes should be implied to convey intense determination. Vertical 3:4 composition, macro lens realism, gritty skin detail, high contrast, cinematic color grading, no text, no watermark.
